The Real Problem

"I'm doing everything
right after 40…
but nothing works anymore."

She exercises. She eats well. But over the past two years, something shifted. The weight won't budge. Her energy crashes by 3pm. She wakes at 2am drenched in sweat. Her Fitbit says 8,000 steps — but she still feels terrible.

⚡
Low energy
Coffee barely works anymore
🌙
Broken sleep
Night sweats, waking 2–3×/night
⚖️
Weight creeping up
Same routine, different body
🌊
Mood swings
Feeling "off" without knowing why

The problem isn't your effort. It's that your body after 40 needs a completely different kind of feedback. Steps and calories can't tell you about hormonal shifts, metabolic changes, or how fast your cells are aging. That's what NOOA was built to solve.

Real Results

What happens when
your body has a guide

From day one, NOOA starts learning your unique biology. Within weeks, the feedback loop kicks in — and the results become visible.

1W
Week 1 — Baseline established

NOOA learns your unique rhythms. Sleep patterns, resting HRV, and temperature baselines are mapped to your body — not an average woman's.

2W
Week 2 — First insights arrive

"Your sleep score dropped 22% after eating after 9pm." Real patterns, real data, real cause-and-effect you can act on.

1M
Month 1 — Habits start to shift

Sleep quality improves. Energy stabilizes. Your Speed of Aging score starts moving in the right direction.

3M
Month 3 — You feel different

Women report more consistent energy, better weight management, and a sense of control they haven't felt since their late 30s.
